title: SloppyXBaby Worklog Entry
description: Machine-readable, append-only worklog for the sloppyxbaby.com project. One JSON object per line in worklog/log.jsonl.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for this entry.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the entry was recorded.

scope.description: Module, file, subsystem, or area affected. Use forward-slash paths or free tags.

references.description: Links to commits, PRs, docs, tickets, or external resources.

tags.description: Free-form labels for grouping and filtering.

status.description: Current state of the item, if applicable.

owner.description: Who recorded the entry, e.g. agent:Hermes or user:Oliver.
